## Summary

Describe the change in 2-4 lines.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the relevant local tests
- [ ] I updated docs/examples/notebooks when needed

## Release Notes

PR title must use Conventional Commit style because `release-please` uses the
merged title on `main`.

Examples:

- `feat: add subtree benchmark JSON export`
- `fix: restore dynamic CASF smoke coverage`
- `docs: clarify PyPI installation`

Breaking change:

- `feat!: redesign public C++ include layout`

## Merge

- [ ] Use **Squash and merge**
- [ ] Keep the squash commit title equal to the PR title
